title: canarium subsidarium
intro: Canarium subsidarium, also known as Black Dammar or Black Cajeput, is a plant species native to Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Canarium subsidarium include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include its essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical applications, or as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
